name: repo-context
description: Repo Context MCP provides programmatic access to repository contents for integrations and automation. It can list directories/files, read any file, return the README, perform TypeScript type analysis (via ts-morph), and search for OpenAPI/Swagger spec files. Supports local repo paths and reading from private GitHub repos when GITHUB_TOKEN is set in the environment. Ideal for code analysis, docs generation, and CI pipelines.
